heading: About TokoHPL
intro: TokoHPL is an HPL (High Pressure Laminate) catalog built to serve Indonesia's interior industry professionals. We are the authorized dealer for two leading brands: EDL HPL and Lamitak HPL.

features.title: Authorized Dealer
features.body: We are the authorized EDL and Lamitak dealer in Indonesia, guaranteeing the authenticity and quality of every product we supply.

features.title: Extensive Range
features.body: Hundreds of HPL references across designs, sizes, thicknesses, and finishes to match the needs of your project.

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.body: All listed prices already include 11% VAT — no hidden or additional fees.

features.title: Reliable Delivery
features.body: Nationwide delivery through trusted logistics partners.

materialP1: HPL (High Pressure Laminate) is a high-pressure, paper-based decorative surface material widely used across the furniture, interior, and construction industries. It's known for strong resistance to scratches, moisture, and heat, and comes in an extensive range of designs.
materialP2: We supply HPL across three main categories: wood grain (woods), decorative patterns (patterns), and solid colors (solids) — in sizes and thicknesses suited to professional project standards.
servicesP1: We serve interior designers, contractors, furniture makers, and individuals looking for quality HPL materials. Our team is ready to recommend the right products for your specific project needs.
servicesP2: For product consultations or further information, reach out to us via WhatsApp or email — details available on our Contact page.
